steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: To convert from posters per minute to posters per hour, we need to multiply by the number of minutes in an hour. Since 1 hour = 60 minutes, multiply the given rate by 60.

steps.title: Calculate the hourly production rate
steps.content:
The printer produces 42 posters per minute. Multiplying by 60:
$$42 \times 60 = 2520 \text{ posters/hour}$$
